# Arseniy Cherednichenko

> Builder and co-founder of Guided, a Socratic AI tutor. Based in Berlin. Works mostly in React, TypeScript, SwiftUI, and motion design.

## About
Arseniy is a student and founder in Berlin who builds calm, fast, beautiful products, with real attention to motion, typography, and craft. Co-founder of Guided (askguided.com), a Socratic AI tutor for students aged 8 to 18.

## Selected work
- Guided — a Socratic AI tutor for students aged 8 to 18. Web app plus native iOS on a shared Supabase backend. React, TypeScript, SwiftUI.
- This portfolio — open source, motion-led, hand-built animated components (React, Tailwind, Framer Motion).

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/ArseniyCherednichenko
- Email: ars7ars3@gmail.com
